objective: Prove and harden Forge's first continuity stage so every visible conversation message is durably captured and every non-noise message is typed into useful evidence-only categories that future workers can retrieve without relying on remembered chat context.
next_action: Resume H5 at its preserved phone-legible visual-reference intake point: research and pixel-inspect only a small authoritative candidate set, use one large subject or stage per image, and retain the K1 typed-knowledge search route for context refresh.
research_gate: Preserve exact source evidence and classify for retrieval only. Measure live category coverage, ordinary-language behavior, noise suppression, deterministic replay, legacy coexistence, and authority isolation before claiming continuity improvement.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized local continuity hardening, deterministic classification, disposable projections, UI search filters, backfill, and verification. Classification cannot edit canonical plans or policies, approve, promote, dispatch, execute content, select a runtime, or alter protected authority semantics.
context_health: Green after live bootstrap verification: capture was running and two seconds current with nine sessions and 5080 events. Audit found 257 projected knowledge records dominated by task and plan, with no explicit philosophy, requirement, constraint, preference, risk, question, observation, idea, or correction coverage; K1 repairs that gap before H5.

macro_findings: Raw captured chat is evidence, while validated material results must be stored once in their owning canonical plan, policy, contract, result, risk, or checkpoint record.
Layered startup must retrieve only relevant typed knowledge and exact evidence spans rather than reloading all transcripts or relying on model memory.
Classification is a retrieval route and cannot silently convert conversational wording into authority or canonical truth.
H5 remains the next product stage after this owner-requested continuity prerequisite.
micro_findings: Live capture and source cursors are healthy, current, lossless, ordered, idempotent, and gap-aware.

Classifier v1 returns at most one record, recognizes six material types through narrow trigger phrases, and leaves ordinary philosophies, requirements, constraints, preferences, risks, questions and mixed messages only in raw evidence.
The live projection contained 257 records: 210 task, 37 plan, 9 decision and 1 research, confirming the category-coverage gap.

Classifier v2 emits deterministic multi-facet evidence records, retains source actor and confidence, provides context fallback for non-noise messages, and suppresses exact acknowledgements and bootstrap receipts.
SQLite retains legacy rows while the read-only current projection exposes only the newest classifier version present.
The bootstrap pack now generates a typed knowledge index/catalogue and a local category/actor search command before transcript fallback.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: K1 audits text capture, deterministic categorization, SQLite projections, search routing, and UI filters without admitting or comparing visual assets. H5 visual receipts remain preserved.

tiers_completed.result: Live capture, canonical routing, current knowledge categories, projection path and fresh-worker retrieval route audited.
Fourteen material categories, source actor, confidence, content fingerprint, classifier version and evidence-only authority compile.
Ordinary efficiency, phone/style, correction/question, context fallback, noise suppression, determinism and persistent authority-negative fixtures pass.
tiers_completed.evidence: 73 forge-kernel tests and four focused codex-capture tests

tiers_completed.result: Generated typed index/catalogue and expanded UI/search path compile in disposable test state.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: The running live database has not yet been backfilled by the new binary, so real category coverage, search output and legacy coexistence are not yet measured.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: One local restart proves actual historical messages become typed and searchable without source loss, duplication in the current projection, or authority changes.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: One local desktop rebuild/restart, bounded read-only ledger measurement, focused verification and the existing complete Forge gate; no install or external service.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: Retain SQLite legacy rows, compare object/event/candidate counts and capture health, reject stale catalogue versions, and fail the complete Forge gate on any existing-system regression.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Stop after live v2 category/search evidence and one clean full Forge gate; return to the preserved H5 route without expanding into semantic linking.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: Passed: live classifier-v2 backfill, typed search of this conversation, capture-current bootstrap, UI build, complete workspace tests, desktop build, projection verification and clean diff all pass.

unresolved_risks: Deterministic phrase rules can over-classify a whole message or miss nuance.
Multiple facets improve recall but can increase library size and duplicate-looking summaries.
Legacy v1 rows must remain recoverable without polluting the current v2 projection.
A typed evidence record could be mistaken for a canonical plan, decision, requirement, or policy.
Automatic relation, contradiction and supersession linking remains unproved and outside K1.
Retention/redaction policy and external connectors remain unresolved.
evidence_requirements: current lossless capture and cursor health
multi-facet ordinary-language cases for philosophy, requirement, constraint, preference, risk, question, observation and context
source actor, evidence ID, content fingerprint, confidence, classifier version and evidence-only authority per record
legacy retention with newest-version current projection
generated typed index/catalogue plus category, actor and text search
live backfill counts and relevant results from this conversation
no plan/policy edit, approval, promotion, dispatch, execution or protected authority effect
verification_plan: run forge-kernel and codex-capture classification/storage fixtures
run conversation-compiler, canonical-system, stage-quality and projection gates
build and restart the exact repo Forge desktop to backfill the live ledger
measure category distribution and search efficiency, philosophy, aging and phone constraints from live v2 output
confirm capture remains current and authority counts/state do not change from classification
run the complete Forge gate and clean-diff check before closeout
resume_after: After K1 live backfill, typed-search evidence and the complete Forge gate pass, resume H5 using one large phone-legible subject or stage per image.
verification_receipts: mandatory live bootstrap passed with 9 sessions, 5080 events and capture two seconds current
live v1 projection measured 257 current knowledge records: 210 task, 37 plan, 9 decision and 1 research
73 forge-kernel tests pass including seven knowledge/persistence fixtures
UI TypeScript and Vite production build pass
live v2 backfill retains 257 v1 rows and adds 3226 v2 rows; current catalogue exposes only v2
live v2 catalogue has 2500 assistant and 726 captured-user facets with no legacy-unknown actor
live typed searches recover efficiency philosophy, aging constraints, phone requirements and the current categorization request
conversation-compiler and canonical-system focused gates pass
complete Forge gate passes with 354 durable files classified, expanded UI build, all workspace tests, desktop build and clean diff
transition: R0 accepted -> H1-H4 verified -> H5 preserved -> N0-N3 natural-method wave complete -> K1 live audit found classifier-v1 coverage gap -> K1 v2 backfill/search/full gate complete -> H5 resume is next
